description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set within a landscaped lot, featuring a main structure with a dark, hipped roof and a prominent front entrance surrounded by greenery. The property includes a driveway leading to a detached garage with a gable roof, separated from the main house by a fenced yard. The front yard is lush with mature trees and shrubs, while the backyard is more open, containing a patio area and additional landscaping. The house itself has a mix of large and small windows, arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the darker roof. The overall layout is spacious, with clear boundaries between the front and rear sections of the property.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark hipped roof, detached garage, and landscaped front and back yards, featuring asymmetrical window placement and a prominent front entrance.
description_view_0: Aerial view highlighting the backyard, patio area, and the main house's roof structure, with landscaping and trees visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the driveway, detached garage, and the fenced yard separating the garage from the main house.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main entrance, lush front yard, and the symmetrical driveway leading to the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the open backyard, patio, and the rear facade of the bungalow with visible windows and landscaping.
